india_trends.title: Qualcomm, Nvidia, AMD and Intel plunge up to 15% as hot US inflation data dents AI rally sentiment
india_trends.summary: The Nasdaq-100 fell 2.3% amid a tech stock sell-off, despite a 16% April surge. Inflation concerns and geopolitical tensions affected investor sentiment, particularly in chip stocks like Qualcomm and Intel. The Fed may consider a rate hike as inflation rises due to the Iran conflict.

india_trends.title: New Income Tax law aims to build transparent, tech-driven ecosystem for taxpayers: Official
india_trends.summary: Pune's Principal Chief Commissioner of Income Tax, Vivek Wadekar, announced the new Income Tax Act, 2025, aims to simplify compliance and foster transparency. Launched on April 1, 2026, the act features digital initiatives like the 'Kar Saathi' chatbot and 'Kar Setu' for taxpayer assistance.

india_trends.title: Brands must adapt to permanent disruption as AI reshapes marketing
india_trends.summary: WPP Media India declared brands face "permanent disruption" due to AI, quick commerce, and evolving consumer behavior, reshaping marketing and storytelling. At its BREW 2026 event, leaders discussed AI-led innovation and the need to rethink engagement in a rapidly changing media landscape.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Comex gold drops $67/oz; silver tumbles $2.2/oz amid rising oil prices and higher inflation
india_trends.summary: Gold and silver prices fell on May 12 due to rising Middle East tensions, higher crude oil prices, and a stronger US dollar. Gold dropped to $4,660 per ounce, while silver fell to $83.67. US inflation reached 3.8%, complicating the Federal Reserve's policy decisions.

india_trends.title: HYBE India launches Snapchat-based auditions for global girl group
india_trends.summary: HYBE India and Snap India are joining forces. They are launching an augmented reality audition process on Snapchat.
